2345290.name: Automatonics
2345290.description:
Explore the Depths of a Distant Galaxy

A distant group of planets may be the solution to host the humans after Earth resources and space are exhausted. The supposedly empty planets are mysterously filled with unfriendly robots. Lead your crew into exploring different planets in search of resources for Earth and solving the mysteries surounding the inhabitant robots.

Automatonics is a beautiful 2D action adventure styled around different planets. Explore unexpected environments; battle mysterious robots and solve the mysteries to bring hope back to Earth.

Game Features

Side-scrolling action/adventure, alongside beautiful environments.

Explore five mysterious planets in search of a new home for humans.

Master weapons and abilities to overcome enemies and barriers.

Upgrade your parts, become stronger, faster and more adaptable.

Bond with your companion droid and face the challenges that await you.

Play solo or co-op to beat enemies and bosses.

Beautiful styled colorful worlds.
2345290.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
